escalation.rationale: Iran struck US air base and threatens closing Bab al-Mandeb Strait while ceasefire talks collapsed, significantly escalating regional conflict.

ticker_items: Iran strikes US air base, targets Kuwait facilities
Tehran threatens closing Bab al-Mandeb shipping strait
Oil prices surge on expanded Middle East conflict
Israel deepens Lebanon invasion, targets Hezbollah

eastern_europe.description: Russian forces struck Ukrainian military-linked energy facilities with precision weapons and drones
Russian forces used Oreshnik intermediate-range hypersonic missiles against Ukrainian strategic facilities.
Ukraine attacked the occupied Crimean port city using Storm Shadow missiles.
Ukrainian drones targeted Russian oil refinery hundreds of kilometers from border.
Russia used Oreshnik hypersonic missiles against Ukrainian strategic facilities.

middle_east.description: US struck Iranian military sites in third exchange of fire amid ongoing negotiations
Israeli forces ordered evacuation before striking Hezbollah stronghold in Dahiyeh
Hezbollah fired rockets at northern Israel as Israeli ground assault expanded
Israeli strikes on Beirut prompted Iran to halt US negotiations.
Iran struck US air base following American strikes on Iranian military sites.
Kuwait reported missile and drone attacks amid regional escalation.
Israeli military targeting first responders in southern Lebanon operations.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran death toll
US-Israel attacks casualties in Gulf states

russia.text: Europe's current militarization risks recreating the conditions that led to June 22, 1941
russia.speaker: Dmitry Medvedev
russia.title: Security Council Deputy Chairman

middle_east.text: Following repeated violations of the ceasefire in Lebanon
middle_east.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Israeli Prime Minister

middle_east.text: Will not allow Trump to make a peace deal with Iran
middle_east.speaker: Itamar Ben-Gvir
middle_east.title: Israeli Security Minister

middle_east.text: No more talks. They're also saying that they're going to completely close down the Strait of Hormuz
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: State media

middle_east.text: Iran warns Israeli attacks in Lebanon and Gaza threaten US ceasefire talks
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government officials

observers.description: French Navy intercepted sanctioned Russian oil tanker Tagor in Atlantic Ocean with UK support. Operation targets Russia's shadow fleet as part of sanctions enforcement against oil exports financing war effort.
Kuwait intercepted missiles and drones amid US-Iran exchanges. Country faces spillover effects from regional conflict while maintaining defensive posture.

Naval standoffs reported between China and Canadian/Dutch forces in Taiwan Strait and South China Sea. Chinese President Xi Jinping reportedly planning potential state visit to North Korea to reinforce Beijing's influence amid deepening Russia-North Korea ties.

Norway became the ninth country to join France's nuclear deterrence initiative as European governments seek greater self-reliance from US defense. This represents continued European military consolidation amid regional tensions.

financial.notes: Oil prices jumped significantly after Iran suspended peace talks and threatened to close Bab al-Mandeb Strait, with analysts warning prices could double.

Ukraine strikes Sevastopol with Storm Shadow missiles amid cross-border air attacks
Oil prices surge over $6 on Iran blockade threats and halted diplomatic exchanges
Al Jazeera updates casualty tracker showing 3,468 Iranian deaths, 3,371 Lebanese deaths

US and Iran exchange fire for third time as peace negotiations continue
